title: Execution Request Mediation Identity And Trace Carrier Contract

mediation_identity.description: Canonical execution-request mediation identity for scenario-01 boundary-edge decisions. Opaque and stable across the boundary; MUST NOT be re-derived at the edge.

trace.description: Opaque trace-carrying value that MUST be preserved end-to-end across the scenario-01 boundary edge. MUST NOT be truncated, replaced, or regenerated at the edge.
